required_prerequisites.benchmark: exact frozen specialist margin manifest, primary win or labor reduction, complete bucket coverage, and zero hard-bucket regression
required_prerequisites.runtime: deterministic, at least two repetitions, zero OOM/crash, and no more than 8 GiB peak reserved unless Kevin approves an exact alternate runtime
required_prerequisites.rollback: distinct incumbent, one command, observed rollback and restore, passing result, timestamp, and evidence hash

negative_fixture_coverage: model card plus download plus smoke only
alternate runtime not approved by Kevin
remaining_boundary: A real promotion packet cannot exist until MF-P2-11.13/MF-P3-08.08 provide the frozen human-anchor benchmark matrix and real results. No synthetic packet is recorded as a promotion.
